manager_action: Maintain current service levels and continue to monitor queue times.
original_review: Station #456 in Warsaw: Amazing service, Verva fuel is priced well, and there were zero queues at the pumps.

manager_action: Improve work organization and reduce wait times for coffee orders.
original_review: Waited 15 mins for a simple espresso at the Stop.Cafe in Gdansk. Total mess, zero work organization today.

manager_action: Improve toilet cleaning frequency and ensure proper maintenance.
original_review: Wroclaw, station near the A4 highway—the toilets were in a terrible state. Does anyone even clean here?

manager_action: Continue to provide training for staff to maintain high customer service standards.
original_review: Poznan, Glogowska street: Very friendly guy at the register, helped me with my ORLEN Vitay app. Superb!

manager_action: Ensure regular inventory checks and restock windshield washer fluid more frequently.
original_review: Out of windshield washer fluid again at the Radom station. That's the third time this month!

manager_action: Improve staffing during peak hours to reduce waiting time.
original_review: Love these 'quick' breaks on the S7 route... 25 minutes standing in line for a hot dog. Just great. 😏

manager_action: Continue maintaining cleanliness and efficient service.
original_review: Lublin Station (098): Spotless, efficient staff, fuel in stock, and the coffee tastes great. No complaints.

manager_action: Provide customer service training to staff to improve engagement and communication.
original_review: The staff at the Kielce station act like they're working there as a punishment. No 'hello', no smile, nothing.

manager_action: Update the website to reflect accurate car wash status
original_review: Krakow, Armii Krajowej: The car wash is out of order even though the website says it's open. Waste of time.

manager_action: Continue to maintain the quality of sandwiches and customer service.
original_review: My favorite pit stop on the way to Warsaw—always fresh sandwiches and the staff is lovely.

manager_action: Ensure timely delivery of diesel and train staff on inventory management.
original_review: No Diesel available at the pump in Rzeszow, and the cashier has no clue when the delivery arrives. Poor.

manager_action: Investigate and address cleanliness protocols to prevent sticky spills.
original_review: The floor at the Katowice station was so clean that I almost slipped on the 'invisible' sticky soda spill. Thanks. 🙄
